title.description: The name of the job, e.g. 'Web Developer'.

company.description: The company offering the role, e.g. 'Microsoft'.

type.description: The type of job this is, e.g. Full-time, part-time, contract, etc.

date.description: The date the job was posted in ISO8601 format.

description.description: A short description about the job.

location.description: Where the job is located. For fully remote jobs, simply fill in the country code of the position and leave the other fields as `null`.

remote.description: The level of remote work available, where 'Full' is fully online and 'None' is strictly in-person.

salary.description: The expected salary or range of salaries plus the base time unit, e.g. $100,000/yearly, $5,000 - $6,000/monthly, $25/hourly.

experience.description: The experience level required for the job, e.g. 'Senior', 'Junior', 'Mid-level'.

items.description: e.g. Build out a new API for our customer base.

qualifications.description: A list of the qualifications that are required for this position.

optionalQualifications.description: A list of the qualifications that are optional for this position.

skills.description: A list of the skills utilized while doing work for the job.

name.description: The name of the skill, e.g. 'Web Development'.

level.description: The mastery level of the skill.
